bio: Mohammad Baseri was a senior official within Iran's [Ministry of Intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence) (MOIS). He was killed on 28 February 2026 in the combined US-Israel decapitation strikes that targeted Iran's intelligence and military leadership as part of the [February 28, 2026 strikes](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026).
editorial_notes: Senior MOIS official. Killed 28 Feb 2026 in US/Israel strikes.
